description: Per-graph concept manifest. The skill generates one of these for paper/ and one for improvements/.

concepts.title: Example Concept Title
concepts.summary: One-sentence summary of the concept. Used in the README mermaid graph hover-text and the HTML detail panel.

notes: Prereqs are either: (a) a fully-qualified GitHub URL pointing into the math-foundations repo, or (b) a local '<NN>-<slug>' identifier referring to another concept in the same per-graph manifest. The skill validates that every (b)-style prereq resolves to an existing local node.
